parameters.query:
SELECT tweet_id, account_name, tweet_text, published_at
FROM tweets
WHERE is_processed = false
ORDER BY published_at ASC
LIMIT 20;

INSERT INTO risk_scores (tweet_id, company_code, risk_score, level, reason, source, created_at)
VALUES ('{{ $json.tweet_id }}', '{{ $json.company_code }}', {{ $json.risk_score }}, '{{ $json.level }}', '{{ $json.reason }}', 'tweet', now());

UPDATE tweets SET is_processed = true
WHERE tweet_id = '{{ $('JSON Ayikla').item.json.tweet_id }}';
